name: N-Linked Glycosylation Prediction
description: Predict N-linked glycosylation sites confined to the N-X-[S/T] sequon from protein sequence. Trained using Prot T5 embeddings, achieving 0.49 matthews correlation coefficient.
capabilities: Predict N-linked glycosylation sites confined to the N-X-[S/T] sequon from protein sequence
Trained using Prot T5 embeddings, achieving 0.49 matthews correlation coefficient

sequence.description: Protein amino acid sequence to scan for N-linked glycosylation sites at N-X-[S/T] sequons
